character_dossiers.name: Mr. Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Injured seaman with a wound in his thigh, part of a mutiny, and involved in negotiating control of a ship.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Killed in a mutiny, referenced as a former captain.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Aboard the ship, with a medical book that has been gutted.

character_dossiers.name: O'Brien
character_dossiers.biography: Dead seaman killed during a mutiny, described as an Irishman.

character_dossiers.name: the coxswain
character_dossiers.biography: Crew member with a suspicious demeanor, observed watching the narrator.

character_dossiers.name: the man with the red cap
character_dossiers.biography: Dead seaman killed during a mutiny, described as not a seaman.
